description: OLMo3 fused post-norm RMSNorm and residual add: output = residual + rms_norm(x).
name: olmo3_rms_norm_residual_add
reference:
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/olmo3/modeling_olmo3.py#L253-L265
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/olmo3/modeling_olmo3.py#L55-L60
import torch

def run(x, residual, weight, eps):
    xf = x.to(torch.float32)
    normed = xf * torch.rsqrt((xf * xf).mean(-1, keepdim=True) + eps) * weight
    return (residual + normed).to(residual.dtype)
